title: P2: Implement ThinkAndPlan tool (mid-execution recursive sub-planning)
description: The LLM can only act on a pre-planned sequence. It cannot pause mid-execution, assess the situation, and generate a sub-plan for an unexpected obstacle. Implement a ThinkAndPlan tool that accepts a sub-goal description string, calls PlannerRouter.PlanAsync internally, and injects resulting actions at the front of the queue. This unlocks genuine mid-execution adaptation without requiring the full ABS refactor.
